mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_ROLE(员工编码, 角色编号) VALUES
(#{employeeId}, #{roleId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM EMPLOYEE_ROLE WHERE 员工编码 = #{employeeId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.角色名称 FROM EMPLOYEE_ROLE er JOIN ROLE r ON er.角色编号 = r.角色编号 WHERE er.员工编码 = #{employeeId}
SELECT 角色编号 FROM EMPLOYEE_ROLE WHERE 员工编码 = #{employeeId} ORDER BY 角色编号
